title: for loop in always block and multi-dimension packed array

features.name: multi_dimensional_packed_array_indexing_with_loop_variables
features.description: Code should include a multi-dimensional packed array indexed by loop variables within procedural for loops
features.snippet: reg [1:0][1:0] v; integer i,j; for (i=0; i<2; i=i+1) for (j=0; j<2; j=j+1) v[i][j] = 0;
